error_signature: Unexpected token ‘<’, "<!doctype "… is not valid JSON
title: Invalid JSON error when toggling Mapbox view
symptom: When attempting to toggle between satellite and street modes in Mapbox, an error occurs stating 'Unexpected token ‘<’, "<!doctype "… is not valid JSON'.
not_this_if: Error does not occur when using valid Mapbox style URLs
root_cause: This error typically occurs when the response from the server is HTML (often an error page) instead of the expected JSON format. This can happen if the URL for the Mapbox style is incorrect or if there is a network issue.
fix_steps: Ensure the Mapbox style URLs are correct: use 'mapbox://styles/mapbox/streets-v11' for streets and 'mapbox://styles/mapbox/satellite-v9' for satellite.
Check for any network issues that might be causing an incorrect response.
agent_instruction: Verify and update the Mapbox style URLs in your configuration.
